/usr/bin/clang -Wall -Werror -target i386-pc-win32 -march=pentium3 -nostdlib -ffreestanding -fno-builtin -fno-exceptions -I/mnt/g/dev/halo/src -I/mnt/g/dev/halo/third_party/xbox -include /mnt/g/dev/halo/src/common.h -Og -gdwarf-4 -g -fuse-ld=lld-link -Xlinker -entry:_start -Xlinker -debug CMakeFiles/halo.dir/src/entrypoint.c.obj CMakeFiles/halo.dir/src/inlines.c.obj CMakeFiles/halo.dir/src/halo/bitmaps/bitmaps.c.obj CMakeFiles/halo.dir/src/halo/bungie_net/network/transport_endpoint_set_winsock.c.obj CMakeFiles/halo.dir/src/halo/bink/bink_playback.c.obj
